examples: The reptilian brain is functioning on autopilot despite the permanent loss of other cortexes.
He licked his lips in an unpleasantly reptilian way.
Their skulls, pelvises, and hind feet are reptilian.
After talking with the genius for a while, I noticed that it had reptilian feet.
From the outside, its sleek hood and delicate haunches look smoothly refined, even a bit reptilian.
